audit_note: High-confidence records are promoted automatically. Main scope covers acoustic imaging/fusion; hidden mmWave track covers radar imaging, handheld SAR/autofocus, FMCW/MIMO-SAR, 4D radar, through-occlusion reconstruction, surface normals, and radar scene understanding. Nature-family mapping includes Communications Engineering.

mmwave_track_removed_non_policy.title: Towards Mobile High-Resolution mmWave SAR Imaging via Prior-Guided Autofocus

mmwave_track_policy: Hidden mmWave side track keeps final top-venue papers, high-relevance mmWave arXiv/preprints, and explicitly marked manual tracking seeds. Nature Portfolio includes Communications Engineering and other Nature-family journals through the curation group mapping.
